name: bunjang-assistant
description: Codex plugin metadata that helps agents invoke the public bunjang skill and local bunjang-cli wrapper consistently on macOS.

interface.shortDescription: Codex metadata for safely using bunjang-cli through the public bunjang skill and local wrapper.
interface.longDescription: bunjang-assistant provides a plugin-first helper layer for predictable agent use of the existing bunjang-cli package. Short aliases such as bunjang tool, bunjang assistant, 번개장터툴, and 번개장터 도구 route to the same public `bunjang` entrypoint. The Codex surface uses the root plugin metadata, public skill, install scripts, and wrapper execution contract together.
defaultPrompt: For market price requests, route through skills/bunjang/references/price.md.
For sales draft requests, route through skills/bunjang/references/sales.md.
Use npm run bunjang -- <capabilityId> '<paramsJson>' for supported CLI operations.
Do not run manual-only purchase, login, posting, or account-setting actions.
